title: Design system survey completed
description: 17 --ldb-ui-* tokens, Slate-based dark palette, Blue/Violet accent, data-ldb-theme attribute drive, 480px breakpoint, emoji icons, reduced motion support

title: Popup design system inventory
description: 7 --bg/--text tokens, Catppuccin Mocha dark palette, Indigo accent, prefers-color-scheme only, 320px fixed, no theme toggle

title: Token naming and palette split
description: Popup uses Catppuccin Mocha (#1e1e2e, #cdd6f4) with --bg/--text naming; main panel uses Tailwind Slate (#0f172a, #e5e7eb) with --ldb-ui-* naming. Accent: Indigo vs Blue.
suggestion: Unify token naming and palette across both surfaces

title: Untokenized neutral surface family
description: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.06-0.28) used extensively for hover/surface/chip but not tokenized as --ldb-ui-neutral-*
suggestion: Create --ldb-ui-neutral, --ldb-ui-neutral-hover, --ldb-ui-neutral-active tokens

title: .ldb-spin class referenced but animation undefined
description: JS uses 🔄 but no @keyframes ldb-spin exists in CSS
suggestion: Add @keyframes ldb-spin { from { transform: rotate(0deg) } to { transform: rotate(360deg) } }

title: JS inline hardcoded colors bypass theme system
description: #4ade80, #f87171, #60a5fa, #666 hardcoded in JS innerHTML strings — not responsive to dark/light theme switch
suggestion: Replace with CSS variable references or theme-aware class names

title: Three panels use hardcoded fixed widths with no responsive fallback
description: ldb-notion-panel width:380px, ldb-panel width:380px, gclip-panel width:320px, popup body width:320px. None use max-width or percentage-based sizing. On viewports narrower than 380px, panels cause horizontal overflow. 480px breakpoint only covers ldb-panel.
suggestion: Change to width: min(380px, 100vw - 16px) or width: 380px; max-width: calc(100vw - 16px) for all panels. Add 480px breakpoint treatment to ldb-notion-panel and gclip-panel.

title: All font sizes are fixed px — no fluid typography
description: Every font-size uses fixed px values (11-44px). No clamp(), calc(), or rem/em units. 44px welcome icon and 22px metrics won't scale down on small screens.
suggestion: Use clamp() for key typography or add responsive font-size overrides in 480px breakpoint.

title: Only one responsive breakpoint (480px) — no intermediate or large-screen adaptations
description: Sole @media (max-width: 480px) only handles panel full-width, mini-btn repositioning, and grid collapsing. No breakpoints for medium widths, wide screens, or container queries. gclip-panel and ldb-notion-panel have zero responsive breakpoints.
suggestion: Add intermediate breakpoints and container queries for injected panels.

title: Toggle switch touch target too small (24px height, 44x18px slider knob)
description: .ldb-toggle-switch is 44px wide but only 24px tall, with 18x18px knob. Effective touch target below 44x44px minimum.
suggestion: Increase toggle-switch height to at least 32px, add padding for 44x44px touch target.

title: Small buttons (2-6px padding) are unusable on touch devices
description: Several inline-styled buttons have extremely small padding (2px 6px, 4px 8px, 4px 10px) resulting in touch targets well below 44x44px.
suggestion: Increase minimum button padding to 8px 14px. Add min-height:36px to all interactive elements.

title: Fixed panel positioning (right:24px) causes off-screen panels on narrow viewports
description: All panels and float buttons use fixed right/top/bottom positioning with px values. 480px breakpoint only fixes ldb-panel, not ldb-notion-panel or gclip-panel.
suggestion: Extend 480px breakpoint to all panels: right:0; left:0; width:100%;

title: Header buttons (26-30px) below minimum touch target size
description: Multiple interactive buttons are 26x26px or 30x30px — below 44x44px touch target minimum.
suggestion: Increase button dimensions or add invisible padding for 44x44px click area.

title: Popup has no viewport meta tag
description: Missing <meta name="viewport"> tag can cause unexpected zoom/scroll behavior.
suggestion: Add viewport meta tag inside <head>.

title: Popup body fixed width:320px causes horizontal overflow on narrow popups
description: body { width: 320px } is hard constraint. If browser renders narrower popup, content overflows with no scroll.
suggestion: Use width: 320px; max-width: 100% with overflow handling.

title: Tab navigation uses nowrap — text truncation without overflow handling
description: .ldb-tab has white-space:nowrap and flex:1. With many tabs, row cannot wrap or scroll. Tab labels squish or overlap.
suggestion: Add overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis to .ldb-tab, or make tabs scrollable.

title: Report items have no CSS class definitions — no overflow protection
description: .ldb-report-item etc. classes used in HTML but have NO corresponding CSS definitions. Long URLs cause horizontal overflow.
suggestion: Add CSS definitions with word-break:break-word for report classes.

title: Bookmark item title has no text-overflow handling
description: .ldb-bookmark-item .title uses font-size:13px with no text-overflow or max-width constraint. Long titles push layout.
suggestion: Add overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis or multi-line clamp.

title: No container queries used — panels injected into host pages cannot self-adapt
description: UI panels injected into host pages use viewport @media queries only. When panel is narrow but viewport is wide, 480px breakpoint never triggers.
suggestion: Add @container queries on panel elements with container-type:inline-size.

title: All spacing values are fixed px — no proportional scaling
description: All padding/gap/margin use fixed px (4-14px). Don't scale with viewport or container size.
suggestion: Use spacing that adapts at breakpoints or rem-based spacing.

title: 2-column grid (1fr 1fr) breaks at narrow widths within panels
description: .ldb-source-option-group uses 1fr 1fr grid without 480px breakpoint override. Below ~300px, two columns too narrow.
suggestion: Add .ldb-source-option-group { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } inside 480px breakpoint.

title: Panel resize has minWidth:300 but layout not adapted for 300-380px range
description: Panel resizable down to 300px but CSS designed for 380px. 300-380px is a 'dead zone' with cramped layout.
suggestion: Add container query or panel-width breakpoint at ~340px, or increase minWidth to 360px.

title: Popup action buttons lack min-height for touch targets
description: .icon width:32px is below 44px touch target minimum on touch devices.
suggestion: Increase .icon width to at least 40px, ensure min-height:44px on action buttons.

title: gclip-preview .title has no overflow protection for long page titles
description: .gclip-preview .title and .meta have no word-break or text-overflow handling. Long titles cause 320px panel overflow.
suggestion: Add word-break:break-word and overflow-wrap:anywhere.

title: Chat container has fixed height:280px — not responsive to panel size
description: .ldb-chat-container hardcoded height:280px doesn't adapt to panel resize.
suggestion: Use flex-grow or clamp(180px, 40vh, 400px).

title: Permission select min-width:160px may overflow in narrow panels
description: .ldb-permission-select min-width:160px combined with label can exceed panel width when resized below 380px.
suggestion: Replace min-width:160px with min-width:120px or flex:1; min-width:0.

title: No ARIA attributes anywhere in main panel or popup
description: Entire main panel HTML template contains zero ARIA attributes: no aria-expanded, aria-controls, aria-selected, aria-live, role attributes, or aria-label on any element. Screen readers cannot interpret sections, tabs, chat, or status updates.
suggestion: Add role='tablist'/'tab'/'tabpanel' with aria-selected on tabs; aria-expanded + aria-controls on toggles; aria-live='polite' on status/chat; aria-label on icon-only buttons.

title: Tab panels lack ARIA tablist/tab/tabpanel pattern
description: Tab bar uses plain buttons with data-tab attributes. No role='tablist', role='tab', role='tabpanel', aria-selected, aria-controls.
suggestion: Add role='tablist' to .ldb-tabs, role='tab' + aria-selected to each tab button, role='tabpanel' + aria-labelledby to each tab content.

title: Collapsible toggle sections lack aria-expanded and aria-controls
description: Toggle sections (.ldb-toggle-section) use click to expand/collapse but have no aria-expanded or aria-controls. Screen readers cannot convey expanded/collapsed state.
suggestion: Add role='button', aria-expanded='false' (toggled in JS), aria-controls on each toggle.

title: No skip-to-content link in panels
description: Panels injected into host pages with no skip-to-content link. Keyboard users must tab through all header/tabs/settings before reaching primary content.
suggestion: Add visually-hidden skip link at top of each panel that jumps to main content.

title: Status dot conveys information by color only in popup
description: .status-dot uses background color only (green/red) to convey API status. No aria-label or text alternative. Color-blind and screen reader users cannot determine status.
suggestion: Add aria-label to each status-dot span, or add visually-hidden text inside.

title: Chat messages lack screen reader announcements (no aria-live)
description: Chat container has no aria-live attribute. New messages and 'processing' state not announced to screen readers.
suggestion: Add aria-live='polite' and aria-label='对话消息' to chat container.

title: Icon-only buttons lack aria-label in main panel
description: Header buttons use emoji content only (🌙, −, ×) with title attributes but no aria-label. Screen readers may not read title attributes on buttons.
suggestion: Add aria-label to each icon-only button.

title: ConfirmationDialog has no focus trap or aria-modal
description: ConfirmationDialog overlay has no role='dialog', aria-modal='true', or focus trap. Tab can escape to background content.
suggestion: Add role='dialog', aria-modal='true', aria-labelledby. Implement focus trap and focus management.

title: ConfirmationDialog ESC key blocked by panel stopPropagation
description: Notion site panel stops keydown propagation, preventing ESC handler from reaching ConfirmationDialog. Users cannot dismiss dialog with Escape.
suggestion: Selectively stop propagation only for key combinations that interfere with host page. Allow Escape to propagate.

title: Popup buttons lack ARIA labels
description: Action buttons have no aria-label. Button text split across .label and .desc divs may not be read coherently by screen readers.
suggestion: Add aria-label to each action-btn summarizing the action.

title: Form labels not associated with inputs via for/id
description: Many label elements use plain text without for attributes matching input id. Standalone labels adjacent to inputs are not programmatically associated.
suggestion: Add for='...' attributes to all label elements pointing to corresponding input id.

title: Toggle switch (checkbox) visually hidden with no screen-reader text
description: Toggle checkbox hidden with opacity:0/width:0/height:0. No aria-label, so screen readers announce checkbox state without context.
suggestion: Add aria-label to each toggle-switch input describing the setting.

title: No landmark regions in panels
description: Panels inject complex multi-section UIs but use no landmark roles. Screen reader users cannot jump between major sections.
suggestion: Add role='region' with aria-label to major sections (收藏管理, AI 助手, 设置).

title: Popup has no landmark regions or heading hierarchy
description: Popup uses div.header, div.actions, div.status but no ARIA landmarks. h1 is the only heading.
suggestion: Add role='region' with aria-label to actions and status sections.

title: gclip-pulse animation not suppressed by prefers-reduced-motion
description: @keyframes gclip-pulse continues running with prefers-reduced-motion. Reduced-motion selector may not match standalone .gclip-float-btn.
suggestion: Add .gclip-float-btn to standalone reduced-motion selector list.

title: Floating buttons drag-to-move lack keyboard alternative
description: Float buttons support drag repositioning via mouse events but no keyboard-accessible way to reposition.
suggestion: Add keyboard support for repositioning or settings option to reset/choose position.

title: Chat input textarea has no accessible label
description: Chat textarea has placeholder but no associated label or aria-label. Announced as unlabeled text area.
suggestion: Add aria-label='输入消息' to textarea.

title: No focus management when panel opens or tabs switch
description: Focus not programmatically moved into panel on open or to tabpanel on tab switch. Keyboard users must tab from page top.
suggestion: Move focus to first focusable element on panel open, to active tabpanel on tab switch.

title: Send button disabled state not communicated to screen readers
description: Send button '发送' when disabled during AI processing, disabled state not communicated via aria-disabled or aria-live announcement.
suggestion: Add aria-disabled='true' dynamically when button is disabled.

title: Inline color #666 fails dark mode contrast
description: Several status elements use inline 'color: #666' which does not adapt to dark theme. ~3.5:1 contrast below 4.5:1 WCAG AA.
suggestion: Replace inline 'color: #666' with 'color: var(--ldb-ui-muted)'.

title: Chat chip has no accessible name
description: .ldb-chat-chip elements clickable via onclick but no role='button' or aria-label. Screen readers may not identify as interactive.
suggestion: Add role='button', tabindex='0', and aria-label to chip elements.

title: Runtime badge color relies on color-only distinction in dark mode
description: .ldb-runtime-badge uses different border-color/background for mode distinction. Color differences subtle on dark surface for color-blind users.
suggestion: Add a small icon or text prefix to badge for non-color differentiation.

title: Report items use color-only success/failure indicators (partially addressed)
description: Export report uses ✓/✗ symbols (good for non-color) but report-error div relies on red color only.
suggestion: Add aria-label to report items for full screen reader support.

title: Popup links open in new tab without warning
description: Action-btn links use target='_blank' without informing screen reader users or adding rel='noopener'.
suggestion: Add aria-label indicating new window behavior and rel='noopener noreferrer'.

title: ldb-spin class used in JS but @keyframes undefined
description: CSS class 'ldb-spin' applied to span elements at 5 locations, but no @keyframes ldb-spin or .ldb-spin CSS rule defined. Spinning emoji effect never animates — users see static 🔄 icon during loading.
suggestion: Add @keyframes ldb-spin and .ldb-spin CSS rule. Add to prefers-reduced-motion selector list.

title: ldb-notion-panel toggle has no transition animation (display:none/block swap)
description: .ldb-notion-panel uses display:none/block toggling with no transform/opacity transition. Contrasts with gclip-panel which correctly uses transform + opacity transition.
suggestion: Adopt gclip-panel pattern: transform + opacity transition with .visible class.

title: ldb-panel (main panel) has no show/hide transition at all
description: Main ldb-panel toggles via panel.style.display = none/block with no transition or .visible class. Instant show/hide with zero animation feedback.
suggestion: Implement consistent panel transition system matching gclip-panel's transform + opacity pattern.

title: No :active or :hover feedback on .ldb-btn / .gclip-btn buttons
description: .ldb-btn and .gclip-btn have no :hover, :active, or :focus-visible styles. Only :disabled exists. All primary/secondary/warning/danger buttons provide zero tactile feedback.
suggestion: Add transition + :hover (scale/shadow), :active (scale(0.97)), :focus-visible (focus-ring) to all buttons.

title: popup.html uses 'transition: all .15s' — anti-pattern triggering layout repaints
description: .action-btn uses 'transition: all .15s' which animates every CSS property including layout-triggering ones. Causes unnecessary repaints and jank.
suggestion: Replace with explicit property list: transition: border-color .15s ease, background .15s ease, box-shadow .15s ease.

title: popup.html missing :active press feedback and :focus-visible on action buttons
description: .action-btn has only :hover state. No :active press-down or :focus-visible ring. No keyboard focus indicator.
suggestion: Add :active { transform: scale(0.97); } and :focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--accent); }.

title: popup.html missing prefers-reduced-motion media query entirely
description: Popup CSS has transition but no @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) rule. Violates WCAG 2.1 SC 2.3.3.
suggestion: Add @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .action-btn { transition: none !important; } }.

title: prefers-reduced-motion selector list incomplete — misses multiple animated elements
description: Reduced-motion rule misses .ldb-btn, .ldb-chat-chip, .ldb-source-option, .ldb-tab, .ldb-toggle-slider, .ldb-progress-fill, .ldb-spin which are outside panel * selectors.
suggestion: Extend selector list to explicitly include all animated elements outside panel containers.

title: ldb-chat-chip has no transition property despite :hover color change
description: .ldb-chat-chip has :hover changing background/border-color but no transition. Hover state change is instantaneous (0ms), creating abrupt flash.
suggestion: Add transition: background 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease;

title: No chat message/bubble enter animation — messages appear instantly
description: Chat bubbles appended with no enter animation. User and assistant messages appear instantly. Typing indicator animates but content messages do not.
suggestion: Add CSS entry animation: @keyframes ldb-bubble-enter { from { opacity:0; translateY:8px } to { opacity:1; translateY:0 } }.

title: ldb-progress-fill has no transition — progress bar jumps between values
description: .ldb-progress-fill changes width via inline style with no transition. Each progress update causes instant jump. Especially noticeable during rapid export updates.
suggestion: Add transition: width 0.3s ease;

title: ldb-status (toast/notification) has no enter/exit animation
description: Status notifications pop in and vanish instantly. Auto-dismiss at 3-10 seconds removes element with no fade-out, confusing if user was reading.
suggestion: Add enter animation and exit class with animationend-based removal.

title: No log item enter/exit animation in operation log list
description: .ldb-log-item entries rendered as flat list with no transition or animation. New entries appear instantly.
suggestion: Add subtle stagger CSS animation for log items.

title: Tab content switching has no transition — instant swap
description: Tab switching toggles .active class using display:none/block. Content swap is instantaneous with no fade or slide transition.
suggestion: Replace display toggling with opacity + pointer-events or add fade-in animation on .active.

title: Float button :active/press state missing — no tactile click confirmation
description: All three float buttons have :hover but no :active press-down state. Clicking gives zero additional feedback.
suggestion: Add :active { transform: translateY(0) scale(0.97); } to all float buttons.

title: gclip-float-btn success/error state changes have no transition
description: Button changes between .exporting/.success/.error states by swapping background/border-color instantaneously.
suggestion: Extend transition to include background 0.3s ease, border-color 0.3s ease.

title: Toggle section collapse/expand has no animation — instant show/hide
description: .ldb-toggle-content.collapsed uses display:none toggled via classList.toggle. Section content appears/disappears instantly. Arrow icon has no rotation transition.
suggestion: Replace display:none with max-height + overflow approach and add arrow rotation transition.

title: popup.js uses setTimeout(900) hack for message delivery
description: open-bookmark-panel handler uses setTimeout(900) before sending message to new tab. Fragile timing guess causes unnecessary delay or lost messages.
suggestion: Use chrome.tabs.onUpdated or content script readiness detection instead of setTimeout.

title: Split design token systems between main panel and popup
description: Popup uses --bg/--text/--muted/--accent (Catppuccin Mocha) vs main --ldb-ui-* (Tailwind Slate). Accent: Blue vs Indigo.
suggestion: Unify token naming and values across both surfaces.

title: Hardcoded success/error colors in JS bypass design tokens
description: Inline style #4ade80/#f87171 in 12+ locations, ignoring --ldb-ui-success/--ldb-ui-danger tokens, breaking dark mode.
suggestion: Replace with var(--ldb-ui-success)/var(--ldb-ui-danger) or CSS utility classes.

title: Hardcoded #666 and #888 colors ignore theme tokens
description: 5 status divs style=color:#666, 1 uses #888. Invisible on dark backgrounds, ignore --ldb-ui-muted.
suggestion: Replace with color:var(--ldb-ui-muted) or .ldb-tip class.

title: Hardcoded #34d399/#f87171 via .style.color in 16+ JS handlers
description: workspaceTip.style.color assignments bypass tokens entirely, no theme adaptation.
suggestion: Add .ldb-text-success/.ldb-text-error classes, use classList.add() instead.

title: Duplicate class attributes on 20+ HTML elements
description: Second class attribute silently dropped by browser. Spacing/layout classes never apply.
suggestion: Merge all class attributes into single class string per element.

title: Untokenized rgba(148,163,184) opacity scale 40+ times
description: 14 opacity levels (0.05-0.35), 40+ occurrences. Systematic adjustment impossible.
suggestion: Define --ldb-ui-fill-1 through -5 tokens and --ldb-ui-slate base token.

title: Untokenized spacing 4-14px with no rhythm scale
description: 2-24px range, 3 utility classes, 50+ inline values. No systematic scale.
suggestion: Define --ldb-ui-space-1 through -6 tokens and utility classes.

title: Inconsistent font-size scale 7 sizes no tokenization
description: 11-44px, no size tokens, 20+ inline font-size overrides.
suggestion: Define --ldb-ui-text-xs through -2xl tokens and utility classes.

title: Split design token systems between main panel and popup
description: Main panel uses --ldb-ui-* tokens with Tailwind Slate palette; popup uses --bg/--text tokens with Catppuccin Mocha palette. Two completely separate design token systems.
suggestion: Unify token naming convention and color palette across both surfaces

title: Hardcoded success/error/info colors in JS bypass design tokens
description: JS innerHTML uses hardcoded hex colors (#4ade80, #f87171, #60a5fa) for status indicators, completely bypassing the theme token system
suggestion: Replace hardcoded colors with CSS variable references or theme-aware class names

title: Hardcoded #666 and #888 colors ignore theme tokens
description: #666 and #888 used as text colors in JS, ignoring the dark/light theme token system
suggestion: Use --ldb-ui-text-secondary or equivalent theme token

title: Hardcoded #34d399 and #f87171 via .style.color in JS event handlers
description: Direct .style.color assignments in event handlers use hardcoded hex values for success/error states, bypassing design system
suggestion: Use CSS classes with theme-aware color variables instead of inline style.color

title: Duplicate class attributes in HTML - second class silently ignored
description: HTML elements have duplicate class attributes; the second class attribute is silently ignored by the browser, causing missing styles
suggestion: Merge duplicate class attributes into a single class attribute

title: Untokenized rgba(148, 163, 184) opacity scale used 40+ times
description: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.06-0.28) used extensively for hover/surface/chip backgrounds but not tokenized as design variables
suggestion: Create --ldb-ui-neutral, --ldb-ui-neutral-hover, --ldb-ui-neutral-active tokens

title: Untokenized spacing - 4-14px values with no rhythm scale
description: Spacing values from 4px to 14px used ad hoc with no tokenized rhythm scale, making systematic spacing changes impossible
suggestion: Define spacing token scale: --ldb-space-xs(4px), --ldb-space-sm(8px), --ldb-space-md(12px), --ldb-space-lg(16px)

title: Inconsistent font-size scale - 7 sizes (11-44px) with no tokenization
description: Font sizes range from 11px to 44px across 7 different values with no design token mapping, creating inconsistent typographic hierarchy
suggestion: Define typography token scale: --ldb-text-xs(11px), --ldb-text-sm(12px), --ldb-text-base(14px), --ldb-text-lg(16px), --ldb-text-xl(20px), --ldb-text-2xl(28px)

title: Popup status dots use different color palette than main panel
description: Status indicator dots in popup use Catppuccin-based colors while main panel uses Tailwind Slate-based colors
suggestion: Align status dot colors to the unified palette

title: Inconsistent button padding across contexts
description: Buttons have varying padding values without a consistent token pattern, creating visual inconsistency
suggestion: Standardize button padding using spacing tokens

title: Theme toggle button size mismatch between main panel and Notion panel
description: Theme toggle buttons in different panels have different sizes, breaking visual consistency
suggestion: Use same size token for all theme toggle buttons

title: Section title inconsistency - class vs inline style for same visual pattern
description: Section titles use CSS class styling in some places and inline styles in others for the same visual appearance
suggestion: Consolidate section title styling to a single CSS class

title: Hardcoded #dc2626 in view error display
description: Error display uses hardcoded #dc2626 red color instead of a theme token, ignoring dark/light theme
suggestion: Replace with --ldb-ui-error or equivalent design token

title: Hardcoded gradient start colors #ef4444 and #f59e0b bypass tokens
description: Gradient backgrounds use hardcoded #ef4444 and #f59e0b as start colors, ignoring the design token system
suggestion: Define gradient color tokens and reference them in gradient definitions

title: Hardcoded #0f766e and #1d4ed8 in runtime badge colors
description: Runtime status badge colors are hardcoded hex values instead of theme tokens
suggestion: Create badge color tokens in the design system

title: Inconsistent section padding - .ldb-section 12px 0 vs 10px 0
description: .ldb-section uses inconsistent vertical padding values (12px 0 vs 10px 0) without a tokenized spacing baseline
suggestion: Standardize section padding using spacing tokens

title: Inconsistent body padding between panels
description: Body padding values differ between panel contexts without a consistent token pattern
suggestion: Align body padding to a single spacing token across all panels

title: Popup lacks header background differentiation
description: Popup header has no distinct background treatment, making it hard to distinguish from content area
suggestion: Add subtle background color or border to popup header section

title: Popup action button description text too small for readability
description: Action button description text uses font size below comfortable reading threshold
suggestion: Increase description text to at least 12px for readability

title: Inconsistent float button sizes - 48px vs 52px
description: Float buttons have slightly different sizes (48px vs 52px) creating subtle visual inconsistency
suggestion: Standardize float button size to a single token value

title: Notion panel bookmark status uses inline font-size: 11px deviating from token pattern
description: Bookmark status text in Notion panel uses inline style font-size: 11px instead of design token
suggestion: Replace inline font-size with typography token class

title: Empty state in bookmark list uses fully inline styles instead of design system
description: Empty state message uses all inline styles rather than CSS classes from the design system
suggestion: Move inline styles to CSS classes using design tokens

title: No :active press states defined for any interactive element
description: CSS has no :active pseudo-class rules for any interactive element - buttons, links, toggle sections all lack press feedback
suggestion: Add :active states with subtle visual feedback (scale, color shift) to all interactive elements

title: Missing @keyframes for .ldb-spin class used in loading states
description: JS uses ldb-spin class but no @keyframes ldb-spin exists in CSS. Loading spinner animation silently fails.
suggestion: Add @keyframes ldb-spin { from { transform: rotate(0deg) } to { transform: rotate(360deg) } }

title: No :hover state on .ldb-btn, .ldb-btn-secondary, .ldb-btn-warning, .ldb-btn-danger
description: All four button variant classes lack :hover pseudo-class rules, providing no hover feedback
suggestion: Add :hover states with background/border color changes to all button variants

title: No :focus-visible on popup action buttons
description: Popup action buttons have no :focus-visible styling, making keyboard navigation invisible
suggestion: Add :focus-visible outline or box-shadow to popup buttons

title: No :disabled state in popup buttons
description: Popup buttons have no disabled styling, making it impossible to communicate unavailable actions
suggestion: Add :disabled and [disabled] styles with reduced opacity and cursor:not-allowed

title: No :active state on popup action buttons
description: Popup action buttons have no :active press feedback
suggestion: Add :active state with scale or color change for tactile feedback

title: Float button drag uses mousedown/mousemove/mouseup only - no touch/pointer
description: Drag implementation uses mouse events exclusively, completely non-functional on touch devices
suggestion: Replace with Pointer Events API (pointerdown/pointermove/pointerup) for cross-device support

title: No .dragging state for gclip-float-btn
description: Float button has no .dragging CSS class to provide visual feedback during drag operation
suggestion: Add .dragging class with cursor:grabbing and subtle opacity change

title: Toggle sections have cursor:pointer but no :hover or :active
description: Toggle section headers show pointer cursor indicating interactivity but provide no hover or active feedback
suggestion: Add :hover background change and :active press feedback to toggle headers

title: Log header (.ldb-log-header) has cursor:pointer but no :hover or :active
description: Log header shows pointer cursor indicating clickability but provides no visual feedback on hover or press
suggestion: Add :hover background change to .ldb-log-header

title: Header buttons (30x30px) below 44x44px touch target
description: Header interactive buttons are 30x30px, below the 44x44px minimum touch target for mobile accessibility
suggestion: Increase button size or add padding to reach 44x44px touch target

title: Source option buttons (~34px) below 44px touch target
description: Source option buttons have approximately 34px height, below minimum touch target
suggestion: Add padding to meet 44px touch target minimum

title: Tab buttons (~32px) below 44px touch target
description: Tab buttons have approximately 32px height, below the 44x44px minimum touch target
suggestion: Increase tab button height or add padding to meet 44px touch target

title: No .selected visual state for bookmark items
description: Bookmark list items have no selected/active visual state to indicate current selection
suggestion: Add .selected CSS class with distinct background/border styling

title: No disabled state for .ldb-btn-secondary/warning/danger
description: Secondary, warning, and danger button variants lack :disabled styling
suggestion: Add :disabled styles with reduced opacity and cursor:not-allowed to all button variants

title: No loading/skeleton states for bookmark list and chat
description: Bookmark list and chat sections have no loading or skeleton states during data fetch
suggestion: Add skeleton/placeholder UI during data loading

title: .ldb-report-error has no CSS styling
description: Report error class is applied in JS but has no corresponding CSS rule
suggestion: Add CSS styling for .ldb-report-error with error state visual treatment

title: No form validation visual states (:invalid)
description: Form inputs have no :invalid or :valid visual states to communicate validation results
suggestion: Add :invalid and :valid pseudo-class styles for form inputs

title: Status toast close button has no :active state
description: Toast notification close button lacks :active press feedback
suggestion: Add :active state with subtle scale or color change

title: Inconsistent :hover background opacity across elements
description: Different interactive elements use different hover opacity values without a unified pattern
suggestion: Standardize hover opacity using a design token

title: gclip-float-btn .exporting/.success/.error CSS classes never applied in JS
description: CSS defines .exporting, .success, .error states for float button but JS never applies these classes
suggestion: Wire up state class application in the JS float button logic

title: Chat chip has no :active or :focus-visible
description: Chat chip interactive elements lack :active and :focus-visible states
suggestion: Add :active press feedback and :focus-visible outline to chat chips

title: No cursor change on disabled bookmark rows
description: Disabled bookmark rows keep default cursor instead of showing not-allowed
suggestion: Add cursor:not-allowed to disabled bookmark rows

title: showStatus renders raw error.message via innerHTML - XSS risk
description: showStatus function inserts error.message directly into innerHTML without sanitization, allowing potential script injection
suggestion: Sanitize error messages before insertion or use textContent instead of innerHTML

title: Export button lacks double-click/concurrent-operation guard
description: Export button can be clicked multiple times, triggering concurrent export operations with no debouncing or lock
suggestion: Add click guard: disable button during operation, add debounce or operation lock

title: showProgress divides by zero when total is 0
description: showProgress calculates percentage by dividing by total without zero check; when total=0, produces Infinity or NaN
suggestion: Add guard: if (total === 0) return or display 0%

title: truncateText uses character count, not grapheme count - CJK truncation cuts mid-character
description: truncateText counts characters but CJK surrogate pairs and emoji may span multiple code units; truncation can break mid-grapheme
suggestion: Use Intl.Segmenter or grapheme-aware truncation for CJK/emoji support

title: Failed items in export report have no truncation - DOM explosion with many failures
description: Export report renders all failed items without truncation; hundreds of failures can create massive DOM
suggestion: Limit displayed failures to first N items with show more option

title: Bookmark title CSS has no overflow/ellipsis - long titles break layout
description: Bookmark title elements have no text-overflow:ellipsis or overflow handling; long titles break the layout
suggestion: Add overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap to bookmark title

title: Duplicate class attributes on HTML elements - second class ignored
description: HTML elements have duplicate class attributes; browser silently ignores the second class, causing missing styling
suggestion: Merge duplicate class attributes into single attribute

title: No offline/network-down detection or UI indication
description: Application has no offline detection; API calls fail silently when network is unavailable with no user feedback
suggestion: Add navigator.onLine check and offline UI notification

title: No rate-limit (429) specific UI feedback
description: API 429 rate-limit responses receive no special UI treatment; user sees generic error
suggestion: Add rate-limit specific messaging with retry countdown

title: Chrome extension popup.js uses setTimeout(900ms) hack - race condition
description: popup.js uses setTimeout(900) to delay message sending to new tab; timing is fragile and can lose messages
suggestion: Use chrome.tabs.onUpdated or content script readiness signal instead of setTimeout

title: Popup.js has no error handling for chrome.tabs.query or sendMessage
description: Chrome API calls in popup.js have no try/catch or error callbacks; API failures are silently swallowed
suggestion: Add error handling with user-facing feedback for all chrome API calls

title: Clipboard fallback execCommand(copy) may fail silently
description: execCommand(copy) fallback for clipboard API can fail without any user feedback
suggestion: Add explicit failure notification when clipboard operations fail

title: No session expiry / token invalidation UI handling
description: No UI handling for expired sessions or invalidated tokens; user sees generic errors instead of login prompt
suggestion: Add session expiry detection with re-authentication UI flow

title: Popup.html fixed width 320px - no viewport adaptation
description: Popup uses fixed 320px width with no responsive adaptation for different screen contexts
suggestion: Use max-width:320px with percentage-based width fallback

title: No RTL support in CSS - mixed CJK/Latin content may break layout
description: CSS uses left/right properties exclusively with no logical properties; RTL content may break layout
suggestion: Use CSS logical properties (inline-start/inline-end) or add dir=rtl support

title: confirm() dialogs are blocking and may be suppressed by CSP
description: Uses window.confirm() which blocks the main thread and may be blocked by Content Security Policy
suggestion: Replace with custom async confirmation dialog

title: Bookmark list chunked rendering creates race condition with selection state
description: Chunked rendering of bookmark list can create race conditions with user selection actions during render
suggestion: Use requestAnimationFrame batching or disable selection during chunked render

title: GitHub import types loop has no progress feedback between API calls
description: Sequential API calls during GitHub import provide no progress indication between iterations
suggestion: Add incremental progress updates between API calls

title: showStatus auto-dismiss timer can hide important errors if new status arrives
description: Auto-dismiss timer on status messages can prematurely hide important errors when a subsequent status arrives
suggestion: Use per-status independent timers or stack error messages

title: Report error messages not truncated - long API error text can overflow panel
description: Error messages in report display have no truncation; lengthy API error responses can overflow the panel
suggestion: Add text truncation with ellipsis to error message display

title: Popup status dots different color palette than main panel
description: Popup Green-500/Red-500 vs main Green-600/Red-600. Different saturation levels.
suggestion: Align popup status colors with main panel semantic tokens.

title: Inconsistent button padding across contexts
description: 6 different button padding values with no clear hierarchy.
suggestion: Define 3 button size tokens and .ldb-btn-sm/.ldb-btn-lg classes.

title: Theme toggle button size mismatch main vs Notion panel
description: Notion panel theme button 26x26px inline vs main .ldb-theme-btn 30x30px.
suggestion: Remove inline style, use class consistently.

title: Section title class vs inline style duplication
description: .ldb-section-title class exists but same values duplicated inline.
suggestion: Use .ldb-section-title consistently.

title: Hardcoded #dc2626 in view error display
description: Inline #dc2626 bypasses --ldb-ui-danger token.
suggestion: Replace with var(--ldb-ui-danger).

title: Hardcoded gradient starts #ef4444/#f59e0b bypass tokens
description: .ldb-btn-warning/danger gradient starts hardcoded while ends use tokens.
suggestion: Define --ldb-ui-warning-light/--ldb-ui-danger-light tokens.

title: Hardcoded #0f766e/#1d4ed8 in runtime badge colors
description: Runtime badge colors hardcoded, not from any token.
suggestion: Create --ldb-ui-badge-userscript/--ldb-ui-badge-extension tokens.

title: Inconsistent section padding 12px vs 10px in different blocks
description: Base CSS 12px, LinuxDo override 10px. Last-injected wins.
suggestion: Consolidate or use .ldb-section-compact modifier.

title: Inconsistent body padding between panels
description: Different body padding and max-height (70vh vs 90vh) across panels.
suggestion: Standardize or document why each differs.

title: Popup lacks header background differentiation
description: No background differentiation unlike main panel header.
suggestion: Add subtle background rgba(148,163,184,0.10) to .header.

title: Popup .desc font-size:11px too small for readability
description: Below 12px minimum readability standard.
suggestion: Increase to 12px.

title: Inconsistent float button sizes 48px vs 52px
description: gclip 48x48 vs notion/mini 52x52.
suggestion: Unify or create --ldb-ui-float-size token.

title: Bookmark status inline font-size:11px deviates from .ldb-tip
description: Uses inline 11px instead of .ldb-tip class (12px).
suggestion: Use .ldb-tip class or .ldb-tip-sm variant.

title: Empty state uses inline styles where .ldb-view-empty exists
description: No bookmarks state uses inline style instead of existing class pattern.
suggestion: Replace with .ldb-view-empty class pattern.

title: No :active press states for any interactive element
description: Zero :active pseudo-classes across all button classes.
suggestion: Add :active states for all interactive elements.

title: Missing @keyframes for .ldb-spin loading states
description: .ldb-spin used at 5 locations but no CSS rule or @keyframes. Static emoji.
suggestion: Add .ldb-spin CSS rule and @keyframes ldb-spin.

title: No :hover on .ldb-btn family buttons
description: Primary/secondary/warning/danger buttons have no :hover.
suggestion: Add :hover states with shifted gradient/brightness.

title: No :focus-visible on popup action buttons
description: Keyboard users see no focus indicator on action buttons.
suggestion: Add .action-btn:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--accent); }.

title: No :disabled state in popup buttons
description: No visual differentiation when disabled.
suggestion: Add .action-btn:disabled { opacity:0.65; cursor:not-allowed; }.

title: No :active on popup action buttons
description: No press feedback in compact popup.
suggestion: Add .action-btn:active { transform:scale(0.98); }.

title: Float button drag mouse-only no touch/pointer support
description: Cannot drag float button on touch devices.
suggestion: Add pointer event handlers with setPointerCapture.

title: No .dragging state for gclip-float-btn
description: No drag functionality. Inconsistency with ldb-notion-float-btn.
suggestion: Add drag support or .dragging class rule.

title: Toggle sections cursor:pointer but no :hover/:active
description: Three toggle-section classes appear non-interactive.
suggestion: Add :hover/:active background states.

title: Log header cursor:pointer no :hover/:active
description: .ldb-log-header has no :hover or :active.
suggestion: Add :hover/:active states.

title: Header/theme buttons 30x30px below touch target
description: 30x30px and 26x26px below 44x44px minimum.
suggestion: Increase to 36x36px with padding for 44x44px hit area.

title: Source option ~34px below touch target
description: ~34px height below 44px minimum.
suggestion: Increase padding or add min-height:44px.

title: Tab buttons ~32px below touch target
description: Primary navigation below 44px minimum.
suggestion: Increase padding to 12px 6px or add min-height:44px.

title: No .selected visual state for bookmark items
description: Only checkbox provides selection feedback, row has no background change.
suggestion: Add .ldb-bookmark-item.selected with accent-tinted background.

title: No disabled state for button variants
description: Only .ldb-btn:disabled exists. Variant classes have no :disabled rules.
suggestion: Add :disabled rules for all variants or [disabled] rule.

title: No loading/skeleton states for bookmark list and chat
description: No skeleton when loading. Processing bubble minimal feedback.
suggestion: Add .ldb-bookmark-list.loading with CSS skeleton shimmer.

title: .ldb-report-error has no CSS styling
description: Used in HTML but no CSS rule. Browser defaults only.
suggestion: Add CSS with danger color, small font, left border.

title: No form validation visual states :invalid
description: Invalid inputs look identical to valid ones.
suggestion: Add input:invalid { border-color: var(--ldb-ui-danger); }.

title: Status toast close button no :active
description: .ldb-status-close 26x26px has :hover but no :active.
suggestion: Add :active background state.

title: Inconsistent :hover opacity across elements
description: Deltas range from +0.06 to +0.10.
suggestion: Standardize deltas.

title: gclip-float-btn state classes never applied in JS
description: .exporting/.success/.error CSS exists but JS never applies them.
suggestion: Add classList.add() at appropriate points in export flow.

title: Chat chip no :active/:focus-visible
description: Clickble prompt suggestions lack tactile/keyboard feedback.
suggestion: Add :active and ensure :focus-visible.

title: No cursor change on disabled bookmark rows
description: cursor:pointer always, even when already exported.
suggestion: Add .ldb-bookmark-item.exported { cursor:default; }.

title: showStatus renders raw error.message via innerHTML - XSS risk
description: Message injected into innerHTML without escaping.
suggestion: Escape with Utils.escapeHtml() or use textContent.

title: Export button lacks double-click guard
description: Async handler never disables button.
suggestion: Disable button immediately, re-enable in finally.

title: showProgress divides by zero when total is 0
description: No zero check produces NaN/Infinity.
suggestion: Add guard for total>0.

title: Failed items in export report no truncation
description: Failed iterates ALL with no cap.
suggestion: Apply failed.slice(0,20) with overflow indicator.

title: popup.js setTimeout 900ms hack race condition
description: Arbitrary 900ms delay.
suggestion: Use chrome.tabs.onUpdated for tab readiness.

title: Popup.js no error handling for chrome API failures
description: No null check for tabs[0]. No lastError check.
suggestion: Add null checks and lastError handling.

title: truncateText uses code units not grapheme count
description: Emoji/surrogate pairs may be split.
suggestion: Use Array.from(text).slice(0,maxLen).join()

title: Bookmark title CSS no overflow/ellipsis
description: Long titles push flex layout.
suggestion: Add overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; min-width:0; flex:1;

title: Duplicate class attributes second class ignored
description: Second class silently dropped.
suggestion: Merge duplicate attributes.

title: No offline/network detection
description: No navigator.onLine check or offline listeners.
suggestion: Add offline/online listeners with banner.

title: No rate-limit 429 UI feedback
description: No 429 handling.
suggestion: Detect 429 and show specific message.

title: Clipboard execCommand copy may fail silently
description: execCommand return value not checked.
suggestion: Check return value.

title: No session expiry token invalidation UI handling
description: 401 shown as generic error.
suggestion: Detect 401 and show re-authorization message.

title: confirm() dialogs may be suppressed by CSP
description: ConfirmationDialog module unused.
suggestion: Replace with existing ConfirmationDialog module.

title: Chunked rendering race condition with selection
description: Select-all during render may miss items.
suggestion: Disable interaction during rendering.

title: Popup fixed width 320px no viewport adaptation
description: No responsive adjustments.
suggestion: Consider min-width:280px; max-width:360px.

title: No RTL support in CSS
description: No logical properties or dir attributes.
suggestion: Replace right/left with logical properties.

title: GitHub import no per-type progress feedback
description: One failure kills all.
suggestion: Add per-type status and try-catch.

title: showStatus auto-dismiss timer hides new errors
description: First timer still fires after overwrite.
suggestion: clearTimeout before setting new timer.

title: Report error messages not truncated
description: Long API errors overflow panel.
suggestion: Truncate with Utils.truncateText(item.error, 120).
